name: ShellLayout
description: Complete application shell layout orchestrator that combines header, navigation, sidebars, footer, floating nav, page header, and panels into a cohesive application structure. Automatically adapts to different themes (CP, VP, PPM, Maconomy) with theme detection.

productName.description: Header props - Product name displayed in header

logoSrc.description: Header props - Logo image source path

companyName.description: Header props - Company name displayed in company picker

showCompanyPicker.description: Header props - Whether to show company picker dropdown

companyColor.description: Header props - Custom company color for gradient border

showFloatingNav.description: CP-specific props - Whether to show floating navigation toolbar (CP theme only)

floatingNavVariant.description: CP-specific props - Floating nav variant: 'full' for all buttons or 'compact' for fewer buttons

showExecute.description: CP-specific props - Whether to show Execute button in floating nav

saveDisabled.description: CP-specific props - Whether Save button in floating nav is disabled

tabs.description: Standard theme props - Array of tab objects with { id, label, active, href } for footer navigation

showMoreTabs.description: Standard theme props - Whether to show 'More' dropdown in footer

moreCount.description: Standard theme props - Number for 'More (N)' label in footer

overflowTabs.description: Standard theme props - Array of overflow tabs shown in footer dropdown

showAddTab.description: Standard theme props - Whether to show 'Add Tab' button in footer

footerVariant.description: Standard theme props - Footer height variant: 'default' (48px) or 'compact' (40px)

leftSidebarVariant.description: Left sidebar props - Theme variant for left sidebar

rightSidebarVariant.description: Right sidebar props - Theme variant for right sidebar

pageHeaderTitle.description: Page header props - Title text for page header

pageHeaderSubtitle.description: Page header props - Subtitle text for page header

pageHeaderPrimaryButton.description: Page header props - Primary button configuration with { text, icon?, href? }

pageHeaderOutlineButton1.description: Page header props - First outline button configuration

pageHeaderOutlineButton2.description: Page header props - Second outline button configuration

pageHeaderOutlineButton3.description: Page header props - Third outline button configuration

leftPanel.description: Panel props - Left panel configuration with { side: 'left', open, title, titleIcon?, headerVariant?, width?, showClose?, showPopout?, id?, class? }

rightPanel.description: Panel props - Right panel configuration with { side: 'right', open, title, titleIcon?, headerVariant?, width?, showClose?, showPopout?, id?, class? }

class.description: General - Additional CSS classes to apply to root element
